title: Retell Create Agent Response
description: JSON Schema for the response returned by the Retell Create Agent (POST /create-agent) and Get Agent (GET /get-agent/:agent_id) endpoints.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for the agent. Format: agent_XXXXX.

response_engine.description: The response engine configuration powering the agent.

llm_id.description: Retell LLM ID. Present when type is retell-llm.

url.description: Custom LLM WebSocket URL. Present when type is custom-llm.

voice_id.description: Voice ID from the selected provider (ElevenLabs, OpenAI, Deepgram, Cartesia, PlayHT).

responsiveness.description: How quickly the agent responds after the user stops speaking.

interruption_sensitivity.description: How easily the agent can be interrupted by the user.

enable_backchannel.description: Whether the agent produces backchannel cues while the user speaks.

backchannel_frequency.description: How often backchannel cues are produced.

backchannel_words.description: Words and phrases used as backchannel cues.

ambient_sound.description: Background ambient sound played during the call.

denoising_mode.description: Audio denoising level for the user's microphone.

end_call_after_silence_ms.description: Milliseconds of silence before auto-ending the call.

opt_out_sensitive_data_storage.description: Whether to opt out of storing call transcripts and recordings.

post_call_analysis_data.description: Fields to extract from call transcripts after the call ends.

name.description: Field name (used as the key in the analysis output).

description.description: Description of what information to extract.

choices.description: Allowed values when type is enum.

webhook_url.description: URL for receiving real-time webhook events.

pronunciation_dictionary.description: Custom pronunciation entries for the agent.

word.description: The word or phrase to apply custom pronunciation to.

normalize_for_speech.description: Whether to normalize text for speech synthesis.

voicemail_message.description: Message to leave if voicemail is detected.

voicemail_detection_timeout_ms.description: Milliseconds to wait for voicemail detection.

reminder_trigger_ms.description: Milliseconds of user silence before sending a reminder.

last_modification_timestamp.description: Unix timestamp of the last modification.
